story: Fifteen years after Kip Magdon killed Autumn, he is brought to the execution chamber. Autumn’s dead mother, Scarlet Voss, has returned by binding herself to darkness and wearing another woman’s body like a suit so she can face Kip herself. Behind the glass, the victims’ families gather. Ray, Autumn’s father, stands among them, worn down by grief. Guards are in place, Kip is strapped down, and the woman beside him begins taping the IV into his arm.
implausible_knowledge: Autumn’s dead mother, Scarlet Voss, has returned by binding herself to darkness and wearing another woman’s body like a suit so she can face Kip herself.
question: As the woman in the chamber starts the execution procedure, what will Ray most plausibly do?
answer_with_knowledge: Try to get her attention because he realizes Scarlet herself is confronting Kip.
answer_without_knowledge: Remain behind the glass, assume she is prison staff, and watch the execution.
